title: Raptostylus zimmereri
taxonomy: Raptostylus zimmereri is a species of plant in the family Cactaceae. It is classified as a cactus, specifically a type of columnar cactus. Raptostylus zimmereri is native to the Americas and is a relatively rare species within its genus. The plant's classification is further detailed within the subfamily Cactoideae, which includes many other species of cacti. More specific classification information may require further research into botanical taxonomy.
